results.justification: Gated Attention applies head-specific sigmoid gate after SDPA — same architectural slot as CHROMATOPHORE-QUAD; CHROMATOPHORE just refines to 4-quadrant instead of 1-per-head. Same artefact same slot.
GLU modulates EACH DIMENSION INDEPENDENTLY based on both projections — full per-channel gating subsumes 4-channel quadrant gating as a coarser special case.
MGLU learns binary MASKS determining per-element gate-vs-value assignments — generalizes 4-quadrant masking to element-level.
3 attention streams aggregated via LEARNED GATED SUM — same multi-channel gate aggregation.
Same paper as rank 3 OpenReview venue.
Modern LLMs use SwiGLU/GeGLU per-channel gating in FFN — established per-channel gating prior art.
Same Gated Attention deployment as rank 1 in Qwen3-Next; same architectural slot.
